title: Target-newer conflict hash-equivalence exception
tldr: When target mtime is newer, classify as conflict only if content differs; if source and target are hash-identical, treat as no-op.

title: Target-newer conflict deferred review in dedicated window
tldr: When target files are newer than source, skip auto-copy and defer handling to an explicit review session in a separate conflict-review window.

title: Runtime watch-mode initial sync queue and concurrency limit
tldr: Runtime watch sync uses a bounded queue (max concurrency 2), coalesces watch events during active sync into one replay, and serializes overlapping runtime config applies.

title: Sync task target conflict policy and orphan cleanup workflow
tldr: Remove automatic deletion, block conflicting target/source path combinations, and add explicit orphan scan plus confirmed manual cleanup.

title: App lifecycle – background mode and system tray
tldr: Define closeAction setting (quit/background), conservative quit confirmation on runtime-state lookup failure, close-event queuing during startup, and tray window restoration semantics.

title: Dashboard volume enumeration uses macOS mount table
tldr: Replace /Volumes scanning with getmntinfo_r_np mount-table enumeration, keep network mounts capacity-unavailable, and standardize app-wide data-unit formatting.
